name: Yucatanstyle Chicken Skewers W/Papayatomatillo Salsa (Gr)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the marinade into the chicken thighs.
2. Cover the chicken and refrigerate for 4 to 6 hours or overnight.
3. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
4. Thread each piece of chicken onto 2 skewers so that the meat stays flat on the grill.
5. Grill for about 4 minutes on each side or until done to taste.
6. Serve with Papaya-Matiz Salsa.
